metaData.SAP Product Name: AH HUAT KOPI O GAO SIEW DAI 16G X 15S

product.name: Ah Huat Instant Black Coffee - Kopi O Gao Siew Dai

metaData.Ingredients:
Non-dairy Creamer (Glucose Syrup, Vegetable Fat [Palm, Coconut], Stabilizer [E340ii, E452i], Sodium Caseinate [Milk Protein], Acidity Regulator [E332i], Emulsifier [E471, E472e], Anticaking Agent [E551]) & Instant White Coffee
• Contains stabilliser, acidity regulator, emulsifier and anticaking agent as permitted food conditioner
metaData.Key Information: Finely roasted high grade coffee beans meticulously brewed to perfection and carefully blended with quality creamer to capture all the robust aroma, a richer taste, creamier and more satisfying. With rock sugar and contains no added artificial coffee flavouring.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Pour content into cup
2. Add 200ml of hot water
3. Stir and serve

metaData.SAP Product Name: NESCAFE 3IN1 COFFEE - RICH 17.5G 28S

product.name: Nescafe 3 in 1 Instant Coffee - Rich

product.description: Drawing upon a proud 50-year history originating from Ipoh, Chek Hup has perfected the golden ration in blending Arabica and Robusta beans roasted to perfection in the most unique way and further enhanced the white coffee's smooth texture with premium rock sugar. Satisfy both your coffee-loving and health-conscious sides. Savour less sweet, healthier white coffee that's still as smooth and rich as the original with Chek Hup Ipoh White Coffee Less Sweet, a delightful blend of medium roasted premium coffee beans from Africa and Asia.

metaData.Ingredients: Non-dairy Creamer (Glucose Syrup, Palm Kernel Oil, Sodium Caseinate, Stabilizer [E340, E452i], Emulsifier [E471, E472e], Anticaking Agent [E551]), Sugar & Instant White Coffee
metaData.Key Information: Finely roasted high grade coffee beans meticulously brewed to perfection and carefully blended with quality creamer to capture all the robust aroma, a richer taste, creamier and more satisfying. With rock sugar and contains no added artificial coffee flavouring.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Pour content into cup
2. Add 200ml of hot water
3. Stir and serve
